ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the movie belongs to */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the movie in million dollars */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating_mpaa" TEXT /* MPAA rating of the movie */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the movie was produced */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie poster */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie plot */,
  "box_office" TEXT /* Box office revenue of the movie */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the genre is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., Rotten Tomatoes, Audience) */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating value (in percentage) */,
  "date_rated" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "review_url" TEXT /* URL to the review on the source site */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the rating is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is an admin */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating value (in percentage) */,
  "date_rated" TEXT /* Date when the user rated the movie */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Optional comment by the user when rating the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "date_reviewed" TEXT /* Date when the user wrote the review */,
  "rating" TEXT /* User's rating of the movie (0-100) */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review is approved for public display */,
  "num_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "num_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Director's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Director's nationality */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the director's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casts" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cast member */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the cast member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Cast member's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Cast member's nationality */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the cast member's photo */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the cast member in the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_casts" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cast member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie in the watchlist */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the movie was added to the watchlist */,
  "watched" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user has watched the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorite_movies" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the movie as favorite */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie marked as favorite */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the movie was marked as a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorite_movies_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorite_movies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommended_movies" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie recommended */,
  "date_recommended" TEXT /* Date when the movie was recommended */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Name of the recommendation algorithm used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommended_movies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommended_movies_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the review */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review liked */,
  "date_liked" TEXT /* Date when the user liked the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_likes_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews_dislikes" (
  "dislike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dislike */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who disliked the review */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review disliked */,
  "date_disliked" TEXT /* Date when the user disliked the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dislike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_dislikes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_dislikes_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* View count for the movie */,
  "rating_average" TEXT /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the movie */,
  "num_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of ratings for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_statistics_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, movie view) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user for the activity */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used by the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
